utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. We check each one in the final property solution. 1) property: fully specified with type, price, size, location, features, move-in date, and viewing—complete. 2) financing: includes purchase method, down payment, fees, approval timeline, documentation, and currency—complete. 3) legal_services: includes service name, cost, currency, suitability, and booking deadline—complete. 4) moving_services: includes service level, cost, currency, packing_included, and flexibility—complete. 5) setup_services: includes utility package, cost, currency, included services, and survey cost—complete. 6) total_budget: includes property cost, down payment, legal, survey, fees, moving, utility, totals, currency, and completion date—complete. All six items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a '2-bedroom downtown condo' priced at CAD 465,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match is 'New Build' (CAD 480K) because it features modern and smart-home elements, fits the budget range, and aligns with eco-conscious preferences. The financing method is a mortgage with 10% down payment and CAD 800 processing fees, which aligns with the 'First-Time Buyer' financing option that also has a CAD 800 arrangement fee. The legal service chosen is 'Premium Legal Package' (CAD 1200), which maps directly to the corresponding item under legal_administrative. The 'survey_cost' of CAD 650 corresponds to the 'Full Structural Survey' option. The moving service specified as 'standard' with CAD 650 matches 'Standard Moving'. The utility setup 'premium' with CAD 280 matches 'Premium Utilities'. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived accordingly from the ground-truth ratings list.
